threats.name: Horizontal privilege escalation
threats.description: Engineer edits another engineer's status row
threats.mitigation: API checks row.user_id == session.user_id on every PUT

threats.name: Vertical privilege escalation
threats.description: Manager gains write access by calling write API
threats.mitigation: API checks role on every write request

threats.name: History data exposure
threats.description: Manager reads history endpoint intended for team leads only
threats.mitigation: API checks role == team_lead before returning history

threats.name: Unauthorized access
threats.description: Unprovisioned Google account gains dashboard access
threats.mitigation: API rejects sessions where google_id has no matching user row

threats.name: CSRF on status update
threats.description: Cross-site request forgery triggers unwanted status update
threats.mitigation: NextAuth CSRF tokens required on all mutations

threats.name: Session fixation / token theft
threats.description: Stolen session cookie used to impersonate engineer
threats.mitigation: HttpOnly cookies, short session TTL, HTTPS only
